title: Éléments du cercle
description: Reconnaissance visuelle des éléments du cercle

consts.figure: <svg width='10em' height='10em' viewBox='0 0 70 70' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text style='line-height:1.25;text-align:center' font-size='5.333' font-family='Arial' stroke-width='.265' text-anchor='middle' style='text-align:center'><tspan x='32.5' y='32.5'>${:O}</tspan></text><ellipse cx='35' cy='35' fill='none' stroke='#0072b2' stroke-width='.707' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' rx='20' ry='20'/><path d='M33.5 33.5l3 3M33.5 36.5l3-3' fill='none' stroke='#d55e00' stroke-width='.467'/><g transform='translate(${:x} ${:y})'><text style='line-height:1.25;text-align:center' font-size='5.333' font-family='Arial' stroke-width='.265' text-anchor='middle' style='text-align:center'><tspan x='${:dx}' y='${:dy}'>${:A}</tspan></text><path d='M33.5 33.5l3 3M33.5 36.5l3-3' fill='none' stroke='#d55e00' stroke-width='.467'></g></svg>

options.name: Vocabulaire diamètre, corde, rayon

figure.content: <svg width='10em' height='10em' viewBox='0 0 70 70' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g visibility='${:v2pt}'><text style='line-height:1.25;text-align:center' font-size='5.333' font-family='Arial' stroke-width='.265' text-anchor='middle' style='text-align:center'><tspan x='32.5' y='32.5'>${:O}</tspan></text><path d='M33.5 33.5l3 3M33.5 36.5l3-3' fill='none' stroke='#d55e00' stroke-width='.467'/></g><ellipse cx='35' cy='35' fill='none' stroke='#0072b2' stroke-width='.707' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round' rx='20' ry='20'/><g transform='translate(${:x} ${:y})'><text style='line-height:1.25;text-align:center' font-size='5.333' font-family='Arial' stroke-width='.265' text-anchor='middle'><tspan x='39' y='${:dy}'>${:A}</tspan></text><path d='M33.5 33.5l3 3M33.5 36.5l3-3' fill='none' stroke='#d55e00' stroke-width='.467'></g><g transform='translate(${:x1} ${:y1})'><text style='line-height:1.25;text-align:center' font-size='5.333' font-family='Arial' stroke-width='.265' text-anchor='middle'><tspan x='${:dx1}' y='${:dy1}'>${:B}</tspan></text><path d='M33.5 33.5l3 3M33.5 36.5l3-3' fill='none' stroke='#d55e00' stroke-width='.467'></g><path d='M${35+:x} ${35+:y}L${35+:x1} ${35+:y1}' stroke-width='.707' stroke-linecap='round' fill='none' stroke='#0072b2'></svg>

options.question: Qu'est-ce que le segment [${:A+:B}] pour le cercle ?

options.name: Appartenance au cercle
options.question: Est-ce que ${:A} est un point du cercle de centre ${:O} ?
options.answer: ${:w=='on'?'Oui, '+:A+' appartient au cercle.':'Non, '+:A+' n’appartient pas au cercle.'}

options.name: Appartenance au disque
options.question: Est-ce que ${:A} est un point du disque de centre ${:O} ?
options.answer: ${:w=='out'?'Non, '+:A+' n’appartient pas au disque.':'Oui, '+:A+' appartient au disque.'}

options.name: Distance au centre
options.question: Voici un cercle de centre ${:O} et de rayon ${:r}. Comparer ${:O}${:A} au rayon.
